basic_details.job_title: Air Force School Pune Special Educator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Air Force School Pune Special Educator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Air Force School Pune. Has been announced through the Air Force School Pune Special Educator Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's or bachelor's degree with 50% marks, B.Ed in Special Education (RCI) or PG Diploma in Special Education (RCI).
qualification.details: A Master's or bachelor's degree from any university recognized by the Govt of India/UGC/AICTE with a minimum aggregate marks of 50 percent in the subject and 50 percent in the aggregate. B. Ed in Special Education (RCI) or PG Diploma in Special Education (RCI)

selection_process: Submission of Bio Data with photograph and supporting documents Interview (implied)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Air Force School Pune Special Educator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Special Educator post at Air Force School Pune?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Special Educator position is 04-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Special Educator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's or bachelor's degree with 50% marks and a B.Ed in Special Education (RCI) or PG Diploma in Special Education (RCI).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Special Educator post is between 21 and 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Special Educator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 28,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Special Educator vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email with your bio-data, photograph, and supporting documents to the Principal, Air Force School Viman Nagar, Pune.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Special Educator post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the submission of bio-data with photograph and supporting documents, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Air Force School Pune.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Air Force School Pune located?
faq.answer: Air Force School Pune is located in Viman Nagar, Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 411014.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit your bio-data with a photograph and supporting documents, clearly mentioning educational qualifications, experience, and contact number.
